title: Cloudflare and OpenAI start a pilot to improve fresh AI search answers
friendlyTitle: Cloudflare and OpenAI are testing fresher AI search
summary: Cloudflare announced a research pilot with OpenAI that will test whether network-level signals from participating websites can help AI search systems discover, crawl, and index content more accurately and quickly. The pilot focuses on content freshness, traffic quality, and page-change signals across Cloudflare’s web network.
friendlySummary: Cloudflare and OpenAI will test ways to help AI search find updated web pages faster and more accurately.
whyItMatters: AI search is becoming a daily interface to the web, but stale or poorly indexed information can make answers unreliable. If the pilot works, publishers may get a more structured path into AI search while users get fresher responses.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This may make AI answers about current web content more reliable and easier for website owners to manage.
